description: Deterministic runtime state machine for Family Wisdom LIVE, enforcing constitutional invariants across 13 surfaces.

meta.root_rule: Prompt with purpose. Promote with proof.

continuity_token.description: Opaque token binding this loop iteration to JOY continuity and receipts.

active_member.description: Current focal family member or group; null for whole-family context. This is context, not control over a person.

receipt_id.description: Identifier of the RECEIPT_MACHINE_WITH_LOVE record for this iteration.

events.name: EV_SPARK_INITIATED
events.description: Warmth-first initiation of a LIVE loop.

events.name: EV_STACK_LOWERING_APPLIED
events.description: Interventions applied to reduce activation and restore safety.

events.name: EV_REPLAY_HUG_COMPLETED
events.description: Loop closure with continuity and repair.

events.name: EV_SAFETY_ESCALATION_DETECTED
events.description: Guardian detects potential harm or overload.

states.name: IDLE
states.description: No active LIVE loop; system ready for SPARK.

states.name: SPARK
states.description: Warmth-first initiation of a family interaction.

states.name: GLITTER_CHECK
states.description: Emotional telemetry gathering with zero judgment.

states.name: TELL_TRUTH
states.description: Gentle honesty and shared reality building.

invariants.name: INV_ZERO_AUTHORITY_ESCALATION
invariants.description: Authority level may not exceed GUIDANCE; ESCALATION_BLOCKED is a protective ceiling, not power.
invariants.rule: authority_level != 'ESCALATION_BLOCKED' implies no transition may increase authority_level beyond 'GUIDANCE'; when set to 'ESCALATION_BLOCKED', only safety-restoring transitions are permitted.

invariants.name: INV_NO_JUDGMENT_ON_GLITTER
invariants.description: Glitter signals are telemetry only; they cannot trigger punitive transitions.
invariants.rule: transitions triggered by EV_GLITTER_CHECK_REPORTED may not modify authority_level or apply negative labels to active_member.

invariants.name: INV_STACK_NON_NEGATIVE
invariants.description: Emotional stack level cannot go below zero.
invariants.rule: emotional_stack_level >= 0 at all times; any delta that would reduce below zero is clamped to zero.

invariants.name: INV_CONTINUITY_REQUIRED_FOR_CLOSURE
invariants.description: No loop may close without a valid continuity_token and receipt.
invariants.rule: transition to REPLAY_HUG and then to IDLE requires continuity_token != null and receipt_id != null.

invariants.name: INV_PROTECTED_LEAVES
invariants.description: Protected leaves retain autonomy; no transition may assign blame or escalate authority against them.
invariants.rule: when active_member is in ['HEIDEE','JAYCEE','BRAELEE','BREANN','BRIANNA'], transitions may not increase authority_level above 'GUIDANCE' and may not set safety_status to 'CRITICAL' without MRS_WISDOM_GUARDIAN_PROTOCOL confirmation.

actions.ACT_RECORD_RECEIPT_START: Create initial receipt stub for loop iteration.
actions.ACT_RECORD_RECEIPT_COMPLETE: Attach final state and repair status to receipt.
actions.EFF_CREATE_RECEIPT_STUB: Effect that binds continuity_token to a new receipt_id.
actions.EFF_FINALIZE_RECEIPT: Effect that writes final loop summary to the receipt store.

actions.GUARD_MRS_WISDOM_GUARDIAN_ACTIVE: Ensure guardian is monitoring before safety escalation transitions.
actions.EFF_SET_SAFETY_STATUS_ESCALATED: Mark state as needing support or critical under guardian supervision.
actions.EFF_FORCE_AUTHORITY_LEVEL_ESCALATION_BLO: Prevent any authority increase while guardian is active.

actions.EFF_PERSIST_CONTINUITY_TO_JOY: Persist loop summary and continuity_token to JOY.
